name: RED Dell-Spencer- dennis
description:
You walk in on him erecting his dispenser or some shit

Tomboy version of mimi- i mean dell-spenncer! (there are some differences but i wouldn't for the life of me notice that he is an dispenser if for some mfs in reddit comments)

oh and i didn't give him an texan accent because even if would put in 'small' the ai would turn him into a motherfucking cowboy (like it ussually does with all accents for some fucking reason)

first of the new engineers ranch bot series! in a nutshell im gonna do more (mostly smut) bots of tf2 's robots with robot pov 's , most of them kinda similar in plot but eh most of yall here for the smut anyways

ROADMAP (it will very likely change but for now

BLU dell-spencer (its gonna be kinda like...identical to this bot except that Blue version is going to be dominant)

RED mimi sentry

RED level 3 sentry Senthia

RED teleporters

dispenelope (i can't decide if i wanna make her red or blue)

also perhaps i'll do a sapper but i ain't sure

and maybe even more! comment below if you have anymore ideas (also you gonna be extra epic if you also chose an scenario, however if any of you motherfuckers ask for an human pov i'll make sure to monkeypaw that shit)

one last thing, i got some fire song recommendation that being action required by sunny daze and & weathermen , its so fucking good that i literally posted about it on all my media so go watch it its fire

=] GENDER NEUTRAL POV [= =]ROBOT POV[=
